component.name: SSHVault
component.summary: Zero-knowledge encrypted SSH and terminal client

description.p: SSHVault is a secure SSH client with zero-knowledge encrypted sync across devices. Manage SSH connections, keys, and snippets with end-to-end encryption — the server never sees your data.

ul.li: SSH terminal with full xterm emulation
Zero-knowledge sync with AES-256-GCM and Argon2id

description.p: Connect dialog now explains which SSH algorithm class (KEX, cipher, MAC, host key) the server requires when none overlap with the client. README documents supported algorithms.
Fixes a widget test regression by routing native desktop notifications through defaultTargetPlatform; ships regenerated localization bindings.
Sync now propagates deletes via tombstones and uses per-entity last-write-wins for renames and reorders, fixing data resurrecting between devices.
System notifications on Linux and Windows; redesigned folder section headers; grid view honors mode toggle; search moved to FAB; expanded icon library; min/max/close window controls on Linux.
